text: The onboarding was fast and the support team solved my issue.
This release made the product easier to use and more reliable.
Customers praised the clear pricing and smooth checkout.
The model response was accurate, concise and helpful.
The migration finished early and the dashboard feels faster.
The export tool saved hours of manual cleanup.
The app crashed twice and support never replied.
The new workflow is confusing and slower than before.
Customers complained about hidden fees and failed payments.
The model hallucinated details and ignored the request.
The migration broke reports and blocked the team.
The deployment failed and erased the cached reports.
